## Logs and screenshots

Attach relevant terminal output, browser console errors, screenshots, or a
small workflow JSON.

Before attaching anything public, remove API keys, private client/project
names, private prompts, personal paths you do not want public, and any private
media.

## Quick checks

- [ ] I restarted ComfyUI after installing or updating.
- [ ] I checked the terminal for `[Koolook]` messages.
- [ ] If this is a sidebar issue, I checked the browser console.
- [ ] If this is a missing-node issue, I tried Kforge Labs **Tools -> Install missing packs** or ComfyUI Manager **Install Missing Custom Nodes**.
- [ ] If this is a snapshot issue, I checked the snapshot library path with **Save to...** / **Load from...**.
